title: synth_instruction_prose_deep
hypothesis: A prose instruction that explicitly demands 4-paragraph implementation depth recovers depth_r1 to baseline levels while preserving the grounded_r1 gain from prose_depth, improving composite score_r1 by >= 0.2 points over baseline.

levels.prose_grounded_deep: Output ONLY the markdown starting with #. For each item write exactly 4 prose paragraphs — no bullet scaffolding, no code blocks. Paragraph 1: state the mechanism precisely — what it does, why it works at a technical level, and the key invariant that makes it reliable. Paragraph 2: give a concrete implementation scenario with the real configuration values a practitioner would set (specific token limits, timeout values, chunk sizes, retry counts, memory thresholds, latency budgets) and explain what the system does at each boundary condition. Paragraph 3: name the two most common failure modes, the exact symptom each produces in production (the log message pattern, metric that spikes, or user-visible behavior), and the specific remediation step. Paragraph 4: state the decision rule for choosing this approach over its nearest alternative — what property of the workload tips the decision — and name at least one production system or published benchmark that uses this approach with a specific measured outcome (throughput, latency, cost, error rate). Every number and system name must be one a practitioner could verify against public documentation or their own infrastructure. Do not invent API method names or library calls that do not exist. Write entirely in English.

notes: Follows synth_instruction_grounded (delta grounded_r1=+1.223, FALSIFIED at 1.5). Key finding: prose_depth improved grounded (+1.2) but cost depth (-0.5), leaving composite unchanged. Root cause: removing code scaffolding also removed the implementation specifics Selene scores as depth. This instruction adds explicit 4-paragraph structure and boundary-condition requirements to recover depth without reintroducing hallucinated code stubs. Primary metric: score_r1 composite (did we actually move the needle?). Secondary: grounded_r1 >= 7.0, depth_r1 >= 6.5 (no regression from baseline 6.7).
